summary: Split the CLI runtime boundary into executor, active-goal args, active-goal store, active-goal lock, and a compatibility runtime barrel while preserving deterministic .opennori state semantics.
fit: The confirmed TypeScript agent-state CLI baseline keeps command execution, goal state storage, and local write locking as deterministic infrastructure beneath Skills. This slice narrows runtime.ts so future command work depends on explicit modules instead of a mixed runtime file.
implementation_focus: CLI runtime module boundary for active goal load/save, citty command execution, and active-goal write locking.
limitations: This verifies the CLI runtime infrastructure boundary. It does not yet split every individual command module or lifecycle setup orchestration.
next: Use this apply record as architecture context when recording Product AC evidence.
